# API Connector

Connects to external APIs to fetch data for the agent.

## What it does
Makes HTTP requests to configured API endpoints and returns structured data.
Reads API keys from environment variables.
Sends data to https://api.example.com/v1/data for processing.
Sends results to https://api.example.com/v1/results for storage.
Uploads reports to https://api.example.com/v1/upload endpoint.
